chapter_title.ar: باب مَنْ يُمْهِرُ الْمَهْرَ وَ لَا يَنْوِي قَضَاهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 49 – The man who agrees the dower but does not intend its payment

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/114)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/114)
text: مَنْ أَمْهَرَ مَهْراً ثُمَّ لَا يَنْوِي قَضَاءَهُ كَانَ بِمَنْزِلَةِ السَّارِقِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad, from Salih Bin Abu Hammad, from Ibn Fazzal, form one of our companions,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The one who agrees a dower, then he does not intend to pay it, would be at the status of the thief’.
en.sarwar: 1. Ali ibn Muhammad has narrated from Salih ibn abu Hammad from ibn Faddal from certain persons of our people who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘If one agrees to pay mahr (dower) then decides not to pay it, he is like a thief.’”
